tools.name: cve_search
tools.description: Search CVEs by keyword, vendor or product. Returns CVSS scores, attack vectors, DORA pillar mapping.

tools.name: cve_latest
tools.description: Latest critical CVEs — daily DORA ICT risk briefing. Filter by severity and banking relevance.

tools.name: kev_list
tools.description: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities — actively exploited CVEs with patch deadlines. DORA Art. 9 patch compliance.

name: mitre_techniques
description: MITRE ATT&CK techniques for DORA TLPT / TIBER-EU penetration testing. Maps to DORA Art. 26.

name: tlpt_scenarios
description: TIBER-EU threat scenarios for DORA resilience testing planning. Banking-specific attack simulations.

name: cloud_status
description: Live status of AWS, GCP, Azure cloud providers. DORA Art. 28 third-party ICT risk monitoring.

name: provider_risk
description: DORA Art. 28 ICT third-party risk assessment: CVE history, news, GLEIF registration, contractual checklist.

name: dora_news
description: EBA/DORA regulatory news for banks. Topics: general, eba, incident, third_party, testing, guidelines, bafin, swift.

name: dora_calendar
description: DORA compliance milestones and upcoming deadlines for financial institutions. All Art. references included.

name: health_check
description: DORAOracle server status and all backend connectivity checks.
